top_signals.title: Senator calls on Rubio, Blanche to push back against Canadian surveillance legislation
top_signals.summary: Democratic Sen. Ron Wyden says the Trump administration should pressure Canada not to enact a proposal that would "weaponize American technology infrastructure" for surveillance purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Xi dabbles in 'AI diplomacy' at Shanghai forum with Thai, Cambodian PMs
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Windows Server 2022 reach end of mainstream support in 90 days
top_signals.summary: Microsoft announced that Windows Server 2022 will reach the mainstream end date in October 2026, but will switch to extended support and continue receiving security updates for five more years. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
